how_it_works.title: How Aria Prop transforms your agency
how_it_works.step_1_desc: Link your CRM (Tokko, EasyBroker), PDF dossiers, or MercadoLibre in minutes.
how_it_works.step_2_desc: Answer inquiries in real-time via web chat and WhatsApp without human delay.
how_it_works.step_3_desc: Filter by budget, location, property type, and purchase intent.
how_it_works.step_4_desc: Sync visits directly to your agents' Google Calendar.
